Our Story
🏙️

Born in London

Qalam was founded in 2022 in London with a clear vision: to help brands communicate with clarity and creativity across every platform.

📍

Operating in Tashkent

Today we're rooted in Tashkent, serving local and regional brands. We're always ready to go beyond borders when the project calls for it.

Crafting brands
that resonate.

Qalam — the Arabic word for "pen" — embodies our belief that every brand has a story worth telling. We blend strategic thinking with creative execution to build brands people remember.

From social media content to full visual identities, we bring together a tight-knit team of creatives, strategists, and technologists who care deeply about the work they produce.

Strategy Creativity Execution Results Community
What We Do

Services built
for modern brands.

📱

Social Media Marketing

Strategy, content creation, community management, and growth for Instagram, TikTok, and beyond.

🎬

Video & Reels Production

High-impact short-form video and professional reels that stop the scroll and drive engagement.

▶️

YouTube Production

End-to-end channel strategy, scripting, filming, and editing for long-form YouTube content that builds loyal audiences.

✏️

Visual Identity Design

Logos, brand systems, typography, and color palettes that communicate who you are at a glance.

💻

Web Development

Clean, fast, and beautifully designed websites that convert visitors into customers and reflect your brand perfectly.

💬
